title: omi-fetch: add real find (search/tag/date/signal) to lookup.py, and get enrichment past stub-only
prompt:
omi-fetch v2 (apps/omi-fetch/) added capture codes + a tags/synopsis/signal schema, but there is still no way to FIND anything except by an already-known exact code. Two coherent pieces of work:

1. Add real find to lookup.py: `--search <substring>` matching title/tags/synopsis case-insensitively, `--since <date>` / `--until <date>` filtering on started_at, `--signal <direction|feedback|idea|noise>` filtering on the signal field. All filters should compose (AND together) and print JSON like the existing --list. Keep the existing exact-code and --list behaviour unchanged.

2. enrich.py's real engines are both confirmed broken at build time (Gemini API returns API_KEY_INVALID, Gemini CLI returns IneligibleTierError — see README 'Enrichment' section). Only 30/274 records (11%) carry any tags/synopsis, all via --stub heuristics. Either fix the ~/.secrets GEMINI_API_KEY / gemini CLI auth so a real engine actually runs, or swap enrich.py to a working engine (e.g. a direct Anthropic API call using ANTHROPIC_API_KEY if available, matching the same tags/synopsis/signal output contract). Then run `enrich.py --all` (or in batches respecting the existing cost cap) to bring real-engine coverage well past the current 11%.

Do not change the pulse.py fetch cadence or the store schema shape — this is additive (lookup.py flags) plus fixing/replacing enrich.py's engine, nothing else.
verify: python3 lookup.py --search <known keyword from an existing title> returns at least the matching record(s) as JSON; python3 lookup.py --since <date> and --signal <kind> both filter correctly against store/index.jsonl; enrich.py --dry-run reports an engine other than stub succeeding OR a documented reason stub remains necessary; enriched_at coverage measurably increases beyond 30/274.

shipped: ORCHESTRATOR ADDITION (priority): view/index.html v3 — (1) freshness bar 'Last pulse: <local> (N min ago) · next ~<local>' derived from store/state.json last_pulse_ts at render (pulse.py now passes state into view.render); (2) STALE banner: red top bar shown when the VIEWER's clock says >15 min since last pulse, computed in JS vs Date.now() so a left-open tab reports correctly, with a Refresh-now button; (3) auto-reload every ~75s (setTimeout location.reload) so a left-open tab stays current with no server; (4) NEW badges: pre-existing v2 behaviour confirmed intact (new_ids -> badge-new/row-new/card-new + 'New since last pulse' band); (5) client-side search box filtering rows AND cards via a data-search attribute (code+title+tags+synopsis) baked into each row/card at render.

Ticket scope 1 — lookup.py real find: --search <substr> (case-insensitive over title/tags/synopsis), --since/--until (YYYY-MM-DD on started_at, quote-artifact-safe via codes.normalized_started_at), --signal (direction|feedback|idea|noise). All compose (AND), print a JSON array sorted chronologically. Exact-code lookup and --list unchanged.

Ticket scope 2 — enrichment past stub-only: added a claude-cli engine to lib/enrich.py (3rd probe, after both Gemini paths, before stub): shells out to the already-authenticated `claude -p --model haiku` with a bare JSON-only --system-prompt, --strict-mcp-config, --disable-slash-commands (no tools, no CLAUDE.md, ~5s/call, tested live). Direct Anthropic REST was NOT viable: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY exists in ~/.secrets only as commented-out lines. Gemini paths left first in probe order so they self-heal if fixed.
README.md updated: 'Real find (v3)', claude-cli engine section, 'Freshness header, STALE banner, auto-reload, search box (v3)' section.
result.constraints_respected: No pulse.py cadence change; store schema untouched (enrichment fields were already v2-additive; no new store fields needed for the view work — freshness reads the existing last_pulse_ts).
result.enrichment_state: AT TICKET-CLOSE: 33/274 enriched on disk (30 stub legacy + 3 claude-cli). enrich.py --all over the remaining 241 records is running as a detached background process (claude-cli engine, ~5s/record ≈ ~20 min; log: scratchpad enrich-all.log) and writes index.jsonl once when it completes — it is idempotent and resumable (enrich.py --all / --limit N) if interrupted. Coverage will be 274/274 real-engine-capable when it lands. Per orchestrator: ticket not held open for this.

verified.search_cli: lookup.py --search omi -> 7 matches; --since 2026-07-01 --until 2026-07-04 -> 27 matches incl. quoted-date rows; --signal idea -> 5; exact code + --list + bad-code exit=1 all unchanged
verified.enrich_probe: enrich.py --dry-run -> 'Engine: claude-cli (claude CLI (subprocess, --model haiku), existing session auth)'; live batch of 3 produced valid tags/synopsis/signal, enrichment_engine=claude-cli (e.g. A273)
